name: Donald Trump
quote: Better get smart soon — no more Mr. Nice Guy. [Apr 29, 2026 — Trump issues ultimatum to Iran threatening fresh escalation if no nuclear deal. Apr 28: 'Iran has just informed us that they are in a State of Collapse' — disputed by CBS News' Tehran correspondent. Directed aides to prepare 'extended blockade.' Rejected Iran's Hormuz proposal as lacking nuclear terms. Apr 24: 'Don't rush me. Time is not on Tehran's side.' Apr 23: 'Shoot and kill any boat laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz.']

name: JD Vance
quote: They have chosen not to accept our terms. [Apr 12, 2026 — Vance after the first Islamabad round. Vance's planned second Islamabad trip was canceled April 22 when Iran refused to send a delegation; ceasefire extension made the trip moot.]

name: Karoline Leavitt
quote: When the President determines Iran no longer poses a threat to the United States and the goals of Operation Epic Fury have been met, Iran will effectively be in a state of unconditional surrender. We expect the war to continue for approximately four to six more weeks.

name: Pete Hegseth
quote: Today will be, yet again, our most intense day of strikes inside Iran: the most fighters, the most bombers, the most strikes, intelligence more refined and better than ever. Iran stands alone, and they are badly losing. Our three objectives: neutralize missile capabilities, destroy Iran's navy, and permanently deny Iran nuclear weapons forever.

name: Mojtaba Khamenei
quote: Iran's navy is ready to make the enemies taste the bitterness of new defeats. [Apr 19, 2026 — Statement as IRGC gunboats fired on Indian tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. Earlier: Hormuz will remain a tool of pressure; all US bases must close or be attacked; revenge is an open file. Mar 12 first public statement.]

name: Masoud Pezeshkian
quote: Tehran seeks dialogue but cites breach of commitments, blockade and threats as obstacles. [Apr 23, 2026 — Pezeshkian signals openness to talks even as Iran refuses to attend Islamabad Round 2. Earlier: 'That we surrender unconditionally is a dream that they must take with themselves to the grave.']

name: Ali Larijani
quote: Iran will not negotiate with the US. The enemy is trying to plunder and disintegrate our nation. Any secessionist movement will face severe consequences. [Killed in US-Israeli airstrike — confirmed by IRGC statement March 18: 'in revenge for the killing of Larijani.']

name: IRGC Statement
quote: Iran will determine when the war ends. We will not allow the export of even a single liter of oil from the region to the hostile side and its partners until further notice. None of the US warships have dared to approach even the Sea of Oman, the Persian Gulf or the Strait of Hormuz during the war.

name: Tim Kaine
quote: The Constitution says we are not supposed to be at war without a vote of Congress.

name: António Guterres
quote: The world must pull back from the brink of a wider war. I deplore the military strikes across Iran by Israel and the United States of America, and the subsequent retaliatory strikes by Iran.

name: Thomas Massie
quote: I am opposed to this War. This is not 'America First.'

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
quote: US-Israeli attacks violate Iran's sovereignty. However, Iran's retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries are also unacceptable.

name: Abbas Araghchi
quote: Iran is reassessing how to proceed with diplomacy. The world has now realized Iran's true power — it has become clear that the Islamic Republic is a stable, solid and powerful system. [Apr 29, 2026 — from Saint Petersburg after Putin meeting. Cited US rejection of Hormuz proposal and 'destabilizing approach' as cause for reassessment. Apr 26–27: Iran submitted Hormuz reopening proposal via intermediaries. Araghchi met Oman Sultan Haitham then Putin in Moscow-St. Petersburg diplomatic tour.]

name: Marco Rubio
quote: We knew that there was going to be an Israeli action. We knew that that would precipitate an attack against American forces, and we knew that if we didn't pre-emptively go after them before they launched those attacks, we would suffer higher casualties.

name: Benjamin Netanyahu
quote: There are many signs that [Khamenei] is no longer alive. Our joint operation will create the conditions for the brave Iranian people to take their fate into their own hands.

name: Sergey Lavrov
quote: The joint U.S.-Israeli military strikes on Iran are a preplanned and unprovoked act of armed aggression against a sovereign UN member state.

name: Pope Leo XIV
quote: I strongly condemn the escalating violence in Iran and the broader Middle East, warning against a 'spiral of violence' that could lead to irreversible division.

name: Amir Saeid Iravani
quote: This is not only an act of aggression; it is a war crime and a crime against humanity.

name: Mike Waltz
quote: Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon. That principle is not a matter of politics. It's a matter of global security.

name: Danny Danon
quote: We are stopping extremism before it becomes unstoppable. We will ensure that no radical regime armed with nuclear weapons and ballistic missiles can threaten our people or the entire world.

name: Reza Najafi
quote: The accusations against Iran developing nuclear weapons are baseless. The attacks on Natanz are unlawful and must be condemned.

name: Mike Johnson
quote: Israel's imminent plans to act independently against Iran necessitated our preemptive involvement to avoid higher casualties.

name: Shehbaz Sharif
quote: International law prohibits the targeting of heads of state. The killing of Iran’s leader is unacceptable.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
quote: There can be no military solution to fundamentally political problems. The 'pre-emptive' justification for the war is questionable.

name: Xi Jinping
quote: The Strait of Hormuz must remain open to normal navigation. China calls on all parties to exercise maximum restraint and protect freedom of navigation for all nations. [Apr 20, 2026 — called for Hormuz to stay open as oil prices surged +6% on Touska seizure. Earlier: 'It is unacceptable to blatantly kill the leader of a sovereign state.']

name: Volker Türk
role: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights
quote: I deplore the military strikes across Iran by Israel and the United States of America, and the subsequent retaliatory strikes by Iran. As always, in any armed conflict, it is civilians who end up paying the ultimate price.

name: Esmaeil Baghaei
role: Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs Spokesman
quote: As of now, we have no plans for the next round of negotiations. The US has shown excessive demands, unrealistic expectations, constant shifts in stance, and repeated contradictions. [Apr 20, 2026 — Iran formally withdraws from second Islamabad talks round after MV Touska seizure. Earlier: 'Any American intervention would be a recipe for an all-out war in the region.']

name: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
quote: The Strait of Hormuz cannot remain open while the United States continues its acts of piracy and maritime robbery under the so-called blockade. Iran will not allow passage while its ports are blockaded. The strait has returned to its previous state. [Apr 17-18, 2026 — overrode Araghchi's opening declaration within hours]

name: Oleksiy Danilov
role: Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of Ukraine
quote: Ukraine stands ready to assist in counter-drone efforts to ensure regional stability.

name: Adel al-Jubeir
role: Saudi Minister of State for Foreign Affairs
quote: Iran's aggression and violations of the sovereignty of Gulf states will have grave consequences if continued.

name: Badr Albusaidi
quote: Active and serious negotiations have yet again been undermined. I urge the United States not to get sucked in further. This is not your war.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
quote: The conflict is greatly concerning. All parties must exercise maximum restraint, protect civilians, and fully respect international law.

name: Antonio Costa
quote: We urge all parties to exercise maximum restraint, to protect civilians, and to fully respect international law.

name: Nawaf Salam
quote: Lebanon sought by all means to avoid being dragged into this conflict. It is a war we did not want. We cannot accept in any way that Lebanon will return to being an open arena for others' wars.

name: Masoud Pezeshkian
quote: Iran would consider ending the war if three conditions are met: recognition of Tehran's legitimate rights, payment of reparations, and firm international guarantees against future aggression. That we surrender unconditionally is a dream they must take with themselves to the grave.

name: Emmanuel Macron
quote: France lost a soldier today. Chief Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion was killed in a drone attack on our base in Iraqi Kurdistan. This attack is unacceptable. Our troops were there to fight ISIS, not to be targets. France will respond to this provocation with resolve.

name: Donald Trump
quote: The war is going very well. Iran is losing badly. A KC-135 went down — we are looking into it — but the war is essentially won. There is nothing left in Iran to hit of significance. We are waiting for Iran to come to the table. Unconditional surrender is the only option.

name: Pentagon Spokesperson
quote: We are ramping up the military campaign against Iran. Today's strike on Kharg Island sends a clear message: Iran's ability to fund its aggression will not be spared. Oil facilities that sustain Iran's war machine are legitimate military targets. The campaign continues until Iran's unconditional surrender.

name: Donald Trump
quote: I am not interested in ceasefire talks right now. Iran knows what they need to do — unconditional surrender. We have other nations sending warships to help secure the Strait of Hormuz. The world is watching and acting.

name: Vladimir Putin
quote: Russia is ready to act as a mediator to find a political and diplomatic solution to the conflict. We urge all parties to show restraint and begin immediate negotiations. The continuation of military operations threatens global stability.

name: Abbas Araghchi
role: Iranian Foreign Minister — CBS Face the Nation, Mar 15
quote: We never asked for a ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation. We are ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes. Negotiate with the U.S. when we negotiated with them twice, and every time they attacked us in the middle of negotiations?

name: Donald Trump
quote: Iran is ready to make a deal, but the terms are not good enough yet. I'm hearing their Supreme Leader is not alive — if he is, he should surrender. Other nations need to send warships to keep the Strait of Hormuz open. The US should not carry this burden alone.

name: Pete Hegseth
quote: Iran's new Supreme Leader is likely disfigured. We are not going to stop until Iran surrenders unconditionally. We have thousands of targets remaining and the means to hit all of them. The campaign continues.

name: Ahmed Aboul Gheit
quote: Iran's attacks on Arab states are fully reprehensible and a grave strategic mistake. Arab nations did not ask to be drawn into this conflict. We call on Iran to immediately cease all attacks on its Arab neighbors.

name: Keir Starmer
role: Prime Minister of the United Kingdom
quote: The UK condemns Iranian attacks on civilian populations and Arab neighbors. But we do not believe in regime change from the skies. All parties must protect civilians and adhere fully to international law.

name: Hakan Fidan
quote: Turkey will not allow the complete destruction of a neighboring state. We are actively working with all parties to bring this conflict to an end through a ceasefire and negotiations. Turkey remains one of the few countries with open and trusted channels to both sides.

name: Donald Trump
quote: It's unclear if Mojtaba Khamenei is alive or not. I'm hearing different things. If he's alive and wants to talk, he knows where to find us. The war is going very well — Iran has never been weaker. Dubai shows Iran is getting desperate, hitting airports now.

name: Marco Rubio
role: US Secretary of State — Embassy Closure
quote: I have ordered the immediate closure of the US Embassy in Kuwait following today's Iranian missile attack on the compound. This is an unprecedented attack on US diplomatic infrastructure. Iran will be held accountable. Our diplomats and staff are safe and are being relocated.

name: Joe Kent
role: Former National Counterterrorism Center Director — RESIGNED Day 19
quote: Joe Kent, Trump's NCTC director and decorated Army Special Forces veteran, resigned his position on Day 19 — the highest-ranking US official to leave the administration over the Iran war. He reportedly told colleagues he was unable to defend the strategic rationale for Operation Epic Fury. His resignation is the most significant sign of internal dissent within the Trump national security apparatus.

name: Benjamin Netanyahu
role: Israeli Prime Minister — Nowruz Message to Iranians
quote: The IDF is watching you from the skies of Iran. [To the Iranian people on Nowruz:] We hope that you will soon be free from the regime that has brought so much suffering upon you. The assassinations of Iran's leadership will continue until Iran's threats to Israel and the world are permanently eliminated.

name: Abbas Araghchi
role: Iranian Foreign Minister — Hormuz Permanent Redesign Statement, Day 20
quote: Iran intends to permanently redesign the rules of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz even after the war ends. Multiple countries have approached Tehran to negotiate safe passage for their oil and gas vessels. We are open to those talks. But we will not negotiate with the United States and Israel while they continue bombing our country.

name: Donald Trump
quote: We are not ready to leave Iran yet, but we will do so in the very near future. Iran knows what they need to do. We have hit more than 7,000 targets. There is practically nothing left to hit. Other nations need to send warships to keep the Strait of Hormuz open — the US should not carry this burden alone.

name: Mojtaba Khamenei
role: Supreme Leader of Iran — Day 22 Statement
quote: Every martyr's blood fertilizes the roots of resistance. The enemy believed it could break Iran in days. Instead, it has revealed its true face to the world. Iran has delivered a dizzying blow to the enemy. The nation has demonstrated its willingness to resist at any cost. The enemy's defeat is certain.

name: Donald Trump
quote: There is no ceasefire as long as Iran refuses to surrender. Anytime I want the war to end it will end — but it will end on our terms. These NATO countries, they sit back and watch us do all the work. They are cowards. They need to send their warships to protect the Strait of Hormuz.

name: Swiss Federal Councillor
quote: Switzerland's neutrality is not passive. It requires us to take no actions that provide material military advantage to any belligerent power. We are halting pending US arms export authorizations and closing Swiss airspace to US military flights directly linked to the Iran campaign. Switzerland maintains its mission in Tehran on behalf of US interests and stands ready to facilitate dialogue.

name: Abbas Araghchi
role: Iranian Foreign Minister — Rejects Trump's 15-Point Plan
quote: We do not want a ceasefire. We want the war to end on our own terms. Trump's 15-point plan is maximalist and unreasonable. A ceasefire would only lead to a vicious cycle of repeated war. Iran's conditions are clear: halt all aggression, pay reparations, end attacks on Hezbollah and Iraqi militias, and recognize Iranian authority over the Strait of Hormuz.

name: Karoline Leavitt
role: White House Press Secretary — 48-Hour Hormuz Ultimatum
quote: Iran will be hit harder than they have ever been hit before if it fails to accept the military reality and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The President has given Iran 48 hours. We have postponed planned strikes on Iranian power plants to allow time for diplomacy. The President prefers peace, but Iran must accept reality.

name: IRGC Military Spokesperson
role: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps — Response to Negotiations
quote: Has the level of your inner struggle reached the stage of you negotiating with yourself? No one like us will make a deal with you. Not now. Not ever. Iran is failing in this war? No — the enemy is failing. Iran has delivered a dizzying blow. Our resistance is total.

name: Shehbaz Sharif
role: Prime Minister of Pakistan — Islamabad Peace Summit
quote: Islamabad stands ready to host peace negotiations between the United States and Iran. Pakistan has been in active contact with both sides and with our Egyptian and Turkish partners. A ceasefire and political dialogue is the only path to ending this catastrophe. Pakistan will not relent in its efforts to bring the parties to the table.

name: Donald Trump
quote: As per Iranian Government request, I am pausing the period of Energy Plant destruction by 10 Days to Monday, April 6, 2026, at 8 P.M., Eastern Time. They gave me ships — I gave them 10 days. If they don't do what they have to do, I will knock out their power plants. I gave them a 10-day period.

name: Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir
role: IDF Chief of Staff — Manpower Warning
quote: The IDF is under severe strain. We face a manpower shortage of approximately 15,000 soldiers. We are simultaneously prosecuting major combat operations on five fronts: Iran, Lebanon, Gaza, Syria, and the West Bank. We need the government to take urgent decisions to address this shortfall. The campaign will continue — but its costs must be understood clearly.

name: Donald Trump
quote: They better get serious soon, before it is too late. Iran knows what they need to do. April 6 is the deadline — it is firm. We want peace, but unconditional surrender is the only path to peace.

name: Marco Rubio
role: US Secretary of State — Day 29 Negotiating Partner Statement
quote: It remains unclear who will speak for Iran in any formal negotiations. We are in contact with multiple Iranian officials through multiple channels. But Iran has to decide who speaks for Iran.

name: Joseph Aoun
quote: Lebanon condemns these strikes in the strongest terms. We did not choose this war. We will not accept our country being turned into a permanent war zone. I call on the international community to intervene to stop these attacks on Lebanese civilians and journalists.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President — Financial Times Interview, Day 30
quote: To be honest with you, my favourite thing is to take the oil in Iran. Maybe we take Kharg Island, maybe we don't. We have a lot of options. I don't think they have any defence. Iran has agreed to most of the 15 points. Why wouldn't they? They're agreeing with us on the plan. Talks are going very well.

name: Marco Rubio
role: US Secretary of State — Day 30 Diplomacy Update
quote: We have made concrete progress in diplomatic talks. There is a growing amount of energy flowing through the Strait of Hormuz. It remains unclear who will even speak for the Iranians in formal negotiations. Diplomacy is an ongoing and fluid process — not one we're going to negotiate in the media.

name: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
role: Speaker of the Iranian Parliament — Ground Invasion Warning
quote: The United States is plotting a ground attack against Iran. Any US ground invasion will be met with overwhelming force. The enemy will regret any such adventure. Iran's resistance has delivered dizzying blows and will continue to do so.

name: IRGC Military Spokesperson
quote: The United States must condemn strikes on Iranian universities by March 30 or face expanded attacks. We warn people within 1 kilometer of US and Israeli-affiliated university campuses in the Gulf region — Texas A&M, Northwestern, NYU — to evacuate immediately. Iran will hold the United States accountable.

name: Friedrich Merz
quote: If regime change in Iran is the goal of this war, I don't think you'll achieve it. History in Afghanistan and Iraq shows us that military campaigns aimed at toppling governments create chaos rather than stability. Europe urges all parties to engage in immediate ceasefire negotiations.

name: Abbas Araghchi
quote: There are back-channel exchanges occurring. But I signal deep skepticism. Iran's conditions are clear and have not changed: halt all aggression, pay war reparations, end attacks on Hezbollah and Iraqi militias, and recognize Iranian authority over the Strait of Hormuz. We will not negotiate under bombardment.

name: Esmaeil Baghaei
role: Iran Foreign Ministry Spokesman — Day 32 Counter-Reply
quote: The US ceasefire conditions are excessive, unrealistic and unreasonable. Iran has formally transmitted its counter-reply. Our conditions remain: end all hostilities, pay war reparations, provide international guarantees against future attacks, and recognize Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz. We will not accept maximalist demands.

name: Marco Rubio
role: US Secretary of State — Day 32 Talks Update
quote: Our objectives will be achieved in weeks, not months. Communications are ongoing through intermediaries. The Iranian officials now at the table are more reasonable than before. We remain focused on ensuring Iran cannot threaten the United States or the region.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President — Day 32 Response to Allies on Gas Prices
quote: Go to the Strait and just TAKE IT. The United States won't be there to help you anymore. These other countries sit back and benefit while we do all the work. American gas is at $4 — that's what happens when you don't deal. Iran needs to open the Strait. April 6 is the deadline and it is firm.

name: Nawaf Salam
role: Prime Minister of Lebanon — Hezbollah Military Ban
quote: Lebanon has notified the United Nations of our position: Hezbollah's military wing is not authorized to conduct operations in Lebanese territory. The IRGC is directing Hezbollah without our consent. Lebanon did not choose this war. We will not allow our country to be an open arena for others' conflicts. We are moving to classify Hezbollah's military activities as illegal.
